title: Different "My Work" Views
excerpt: I would like to be able to customize different views within the My work tab. It would be helpful to have separate views for each team managed so I can better evaluate workload. I think this would help the data appear les…

posts.author: vmull29 (V)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to customize different views within the My work tab. It would be helpful to have separate views for each team managed so I can better evaluate workload. I think this would help the data appear less overwhelming and more valuable.
